messages.content:
Hi,
MRD Financial Advisory Pvt Ltd deals in the loan Syndication last two decades and has associated with almost all private banks and NBFCs.

After lockdown again We have started the process for sanction and disbursal of following loans -

# Loan Against Residential or commercial Property,
# Working Capital Loan like CC, OD, Dropline Over Draft Facility,
# Home Loans
# Balance Transfer with Top Up.
# Commercial property purchase loan 

 If you or your friends and relatives have any requirement please inform us.

we are always ready to serve you,

Thanks and regards Mahesh Dubey MRD Financial Advisory Pvt Ltd, 9874070300 or 9331260835

https://mrdfinancial.in

share.share_text: We are the best service provider for home loans and loan against Property in Kolkata. we have association with all leading Privet Banks and NBFCs. we helf the customer to get the right product with utmost convenience.
